reasoning: The focus today is on lactate clearance and improving aerobic base to address your primary limiter. Your last ride showed a respectable average power, but with an extended rest period, we'll ramp up gradually. The Alpine Loop's long climb demands sustained power, and this workout will help you maintain and even increase your average power during extended efforts.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 5x6 minutes Over-Unders: 3 mins at 218W, 2 mins at 256W, 1 min at 209W. 2-minute recovery between efforts.

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
